'''Olsi Krasniqi''' (born 28 June 1992) is an [[British Albanian|Albanian]] former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who last played as a {{rlp|pr}} for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

He previously played for [[Harlequins Rugby League]] in the [[Super League]], and on loan from [[London Broncos|London]] at the [[London Skolars]] in [[League 1 (rugby league)|League 1]]. Krasniqi played for the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the Super League, and on loan from [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] at the [[North Wales Crusaders]] in [[2016 League 1|Kingstone Press League 1]]. He also played for the [[Toronto Wolfpack]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]], and on loan from [[Toronto Wolfpack|Toronto]] at the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[2019 Betfred Championship|Championship]].

==Background==
Krasniqi was born in [[Tirana]], [[Albania]]; after his family moved to England he grew up in [[Feltham]], [[London]].<ref name="Dorn Chorus Wows The Stoop">{{cite web|url=http://www.league.quins.co.uk/rugby/11812.php|title=Dorn Chorus Wows The Stoop|publisher=league.quins.co.uk|date=2010-06-06|access-date=2010-06-07}}{{Dead link|date=January 2026 |bot=InternetArchiveBot }}</ref> His father is a [[Professional wrestling|professional wrestler]] from Albania.<ref name="Quins tribute to absent Purdham">{{cite web|url=http://www.superleague.co.uk/article.php?id=17983|title=Quins tribute to absent Purdham|publisher=superleague.co.uk|date=2010-06-07|access-date=2010-06-07}}</ref>

==Career==
===Harlequins RL / London Broncos===
He made his first team début as a 17-year-old for Harlequins RL in 2010's [[Super League XV]]; coming off the interchange bench to score a try on début in a 50–22 win over [[Crusaders Rugby League|Crusaders RL]].
[[File:Olsi Krasniqi.JPG|thumb|right|Krasniqi playing for Harlequins RL against the [[Catalans Dragons]] in 2010]]
He spent time on loan from the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] at the [[London Skolars]] in [[League 1 (rugby league)|League 1]] in 2012 and 2013.

===Salford Red Devils===
Krasniqi joined the [[Salford Red Devils]] ahead of the [[2015 Super League season]].

He spent time on loan from [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] at the [[North Wales Crusaders]] in [[2016 League 1|Kingstone Press League 1]].

===Toronto Wolfpack===
He joined the [[Toronto Wolfpack]] ahead of the [[2018 RFL Championship season]].

Krasniqi also spent time on loan from [[Toronto Wolfpack|Toronto]] at the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[2019 Betfred Championship|Betfred Championship]].

===London Broncos===
Krasniqi left the [[Toronto Wolfpack|Wolfpack]] to return to the [[London Broncos]] part way through the [[2019 Super League season]].

He retired in 2021 due to concussion injuries.<ref>[https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/exclusive-ex-super-league-forward-olsi-krasniqi-in-brain-trauma-injury-revelation-and-horrific-symptoms-49363/ Exclusive: Ex-Super League forward Olsi Krasniqi in brain trauma injury revelation and horrific symptoms]</ref>
